name: Maple Popcorn Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sugar, syrup, water, and salt to 280°F (brittle).
2. Add butter and cook slowly to 294°F.
3. Meanwhile, grind popped corn coarsely through a meat grinder or chop in a chopping bowl.
4. When the syrup is cooked, remove from heat and stir in the popcorn.
5. Pour onto an oiled marble baking sheet.
6. Roll out with an oiled rolling pin.
7. Cut into squares or bars.
8. Makes about 3 dozen 2-inch squares.
